expectations.evidence: @conduction/nextcloud-vue is a Conduction-internal npm package. Naive Claude has no knowledge of CnDataTable, CnDetailViewLayout, useObjectStore, or any other Cn* component. It would use @nextcloud/vue (NcButton, etc.) or build custom components.

useObjectStore is a Conduction-specific abstraction from the @conduction/nextcloud-vue library. Naive Claude would use a standard Pinia defineStore pattern without the useObjectStore base, missing the auditTrailsPlugin, filesPlugin, relationsPlugin, and lifecyclePlugin integrations.

Vue Router is general Vue.js knowledge. Naive Claude would use Vue Router. However, the specific history mode configuration with Nextcloud base path (/index.php/apps/{appname}/) requires Conduction-specific knowledge.
<style scoped> is a well-known Vue best practice. Naive Claude would likely use scoped styles by default.

notes: @conduction/nextcloud-vue and useObjectStore are the skill's primary value — they are Conduction-specific and unknown to naive Claude. Vue Router and scoped styles are general Vue knowledge.
